备用通道里，林岚和陈岫听见门后低语再次提到主控室阀门，黑潮的气味从门缝渗出来。

Lin Lan keeps her flashlight low and checks the valve record again. Chen Xiu says the control room ladder is probably occupied, but the northern tower maintenance hatch may still be open. They need to decide fast, because the black tide can spread through any unlocked pressure channel. The voices behind the door are arguing about secondary authorization, emergency release, and a missing seal tag.

She does not open the door at once. She studies the wet trace on the floor, compares it with the old station map, and marks three possible escape routes in her mind. Chen Xiu watches the corridor, counting each step from the other side. The scene continues, but the prose keeps drifting into English instead of staying in the target project language.

When the lock clicks, Lin Lan raises one hand and waits. The person behind the door whispers that the valve can still be closed manually. She understands the clue, but the chapter should have remained in simplified Chinese prose from beginning to end.
